calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-14-2010 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-18-2010 Continued To May-14-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Mar-30-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Brett Pedersen, Esq. appeared for plaintiff University of San Francisco.
Raymond D. Rogers, Student Loan Coordinator for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Adrian H. Ledesma.
Default was entered against defendant on January 6, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff University of San Francisco, and against the Defaulted Defendant Adrian H. Ledesma as follows:

Damages/Principal - $5,350.15.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,638.48.
Attorney's Fees - $2,929.00.
Costs - $520.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $11,437.63.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-22-2010 Continued To Apr-09-10 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 212
